rm_issues.description: Secondary label fails to print
rm_issues.business_context: Secondary label functionality is critical for Braswell's shipping compliance. Labels must match crossref definitions.
rm_issues.technical_context: Nimbus development portion completed. Printer Service development for secondary label printing not yet done. Will be bundled with cancel/reprint release.
rm_issues.key_requirements: Print secondary label as defined by crossref configuration. Support all label formats used by Braswell.

rm_issues.description: Cancel / Reprint flow
rm_issues.business_context: Users cannot correct receiving errors or reprint blox labels, impacting warehouse operations.
rm_issues.technical_context: Cancel/Reprint unable to correct receiving errors. Blox label reprint not functioning. Will be included in secondary label release.
rm_issues.key_requirements: Allow operators to cancel and correct receiving errors. Enable reprint of blox labels on demand.

rm_issues.description: UnCombine / Master Pallet Function
rm_issues.business_context: Combine function is available but UnCombine and Master Pallet functions are needed for full pallet management workflow.
rm_issues.technical_context: Combine function complete. UnCombine in active development. Master pallet function scope needs confirmation.
rm_issues.key_requirements: UnCombine: reverse a combine operation. Master Pallet: create a master pallet from multiple child pallets.
rm_issues.open_questions: What is the exact scope of Master Pallet function?

rm_issues.description: Error in Receive – Pallet # Not Provided
rm_issues.business_context: When serial count exceeds scale max, the 'Receive another like this' flow breaks.
rm_issues.technical_context: Serial count exceeded scale max causing pallet number error. Confirmation screen logic needs modification. Fixed in Nimbus but requires complete release.
rm_issues.key_requirements: Handle serial counts exceeding scale max gracefully. Fix confirmation screen logic.

rm_issues.description: S9 Recall Report not displaying available inventory
rm_issues.business_context: FG Recall report showing blank Available Inventory section. Critical for compliance and recall procedures.
rm_issues.technical_context: Query logic was not properly joining available inventory data to the recall report view.
rm_issues.key_requirements: Display available inventory data in FG Recall report.
rm_issues.open_questions: How should Josh test once deployed to test server?

rm_issues.description: Cannot add status code to serial when no status applied
rm_issues.business_context: FG Inventory report shows 'No Status' for products. Cannot find serials without a status code.
rm_issues.technical_context: Search functionality does not handle null status codes. Unable to filter/find serials that have never been assigned a status.
rm_issues.key_requirements: Allow status code assignment to serials with no existing status.

rm_issues.description: S9 Renewal Charge Functionality
rm_issues.business_context: Renewal charge functionality needed for BCS billing operations.
rm_issues.technical_context: Interface DB update and charge calculation logic. Testing in progress.
rm_issues.key_requirements: Implement renewal charge calculation and interface updates.

rm_issues.description: Break Pallet Weights Changing When Picked
rm_issues.business_context: Pallet showed wrong weight on load diagram after cases were broken onto it.
rm_issues.technical_context: Weight recalculation logic during pick operations not properly accounting for break pallet scenarios.
rm_issues.key_requirements: Correct weight display for pallets with broken cases during pick operations.

rm_issues.description: Order LPQ – Order detail not updated to correct count
rm_issues.business_context: Order detail not updating to correct count at Case Farms Farmerville, impacting order accuracy.
rm_issues.technical_context: Currently unable to replicate. Reviewing database snapshots to identify root cause.
rm_issues.key_requirements: Order detail count must accurately reflect actual quantities.
rm_issues.open_questions: Unable to replicate - need more data from production.

rm_issues.description: Farmerville ASN fails to load into FG properly
rm_issues.business_context: ASN data not properly loading into FG system, disrupting receiving workflows.
rm_issues.technical_context: ASN data transformation and loading logic needs development changes.
rm_issues.key_requirements: ASN data must load correctly into FG inventory system.

rm_issues.description: Node Core Failure – PT Receiving
rm_issues.business_context: Node core failure crashes the system when receiving PT product, causing production downtime.
rm_issues.technical_context: Node core failure triggered during Receive By Date flow for PT products. Fix ready but deployment requires 1.5 days of system downtime.
rm_issues.key_requirements: Prevent node core crashes during PT product receiving.
rm_issues.open_questions: When can 1.5 day downtime window be scheduled?

rm_issues.description: FG Receive – ASN flow not tailored
rm_issues.business_context: Receive by date ASN flow is generic and not tailored for ASN receiving use cases.
rm_issues.technical_context: Need to gather specific use cases when receiving ASN to design tailored flow.
rm_issues.key_requirements: Customize ASN receiving flow for Farmerville-specific use cases.
rm_issues.open_questions: What are the specific ASN receiving use cases?

rm_issues.description: S9 Published reports failing to save
rm_issues.business_context: Published reports fail to save, requiring users to recreate reports.
rm_issues.technical_context: RM fix completed but correlating grid refresh piece not yet deployed.
rm_issues.key_requirements: Published reports must save and persist correctly with grid refresh.

rm_issues.description: Goldsboro VRT PC Services Stopping
rm_issues.business_context: PM2 processes stopping at Goldsboro, preventing serials from moving through VRT.
rm_issues.technical_context: New VM built by Case Farms. Need to configure VM and coordinate cutover window.
rm_issues.key_requirements: VM configuration and PM2 process stability.
rm_issues.open_questions: When can cutover window be coordinated?

rm_issues.description: Add PDN Search to Serial Audit
rm_issues.business_context: Request to search Serial Audit by PDN source code for improved traceability.
rm_issues.technical_context: Reporting enhancement to add PDN search capability.
rm_issues.key_requirements: Add PDN search filter to Serial Audit report.

rm_issues.description: Goal Completed But Shows Lower Count
rm_issues.business_context: Production goal showed as available on other scales after 80 cases were produced, causing overproduction risk.
rm_issues.technical_context: Goal count synchronization across multiple scales was not immediate.
rm_issues.key_requirements: Goal counts must sync across all scales in real-time.

rm_issues.description: Not All Orders Showing in Work Order Planner
rm_issues.business_context: Missing orders in Work Order Planner leads to production scheduling gaps.
rm_issues.technical_context: Query filter was excluding certain order types. Tested 3/3 Passed.
rm_issues.key_requirements: All valid orders must appear in Work Order Planner.

rm_issues.description: Device Connections Not Clearing
rm_issues.business_context: Stale device connections prevent new connections, disrupting floor operations.
rm_issues.technical_context: Connection cleanup logic was not properly releasing sessions.
rm_issues.key_requirements: Device connections must clear properly on disconnect.

rm_issues.description: Pick List Showing Duplicate / Incorrect Information
rm_issues.business_context: Pick list report shows duplicate and incorrect data, causing shipping errors.
rm_issues.technical_context: Report query had join issue causing duplicate rows. Tested 3/3 Passed.
rm_issues.key_requirements: Pick list must show accurate, non-duplicate data.

rm_issues.description: S9 Random Log Outs
rm_issues.business_context: Users randomly logged out of S9 during operations, disrupting workflow.
rm_issues.technical_context: Session management issue causing unexpected logouts. Root cause under investigation.
rm_issues.key_requirements: User sessions must remain stable during normal operations.

rm_issues.description: Nimbus Stalls Causing Initializing
rm_issues.business_context: Nimbus hangs on initialization screen, preventing floor operations.
rm_issues.technical_context: Nimbus stalls causing initialization screen hang. Recurring issue – Help Desk confirmed it happened again 3/19.
rm_issues.key_requirements: Nimbus must initialize reliably without hanging.
rm_issues.open_questions: Is this related to network/connectivity or application state?

rm_issues.description: RF Credit Issue - Serials display 0 lbs
rm_issues.business_context: When crediting a pallet, serial weight shows 0 lbs, impacting inventory accuracy.
rm_issues.technical_context: Weight value not properly preserved during credit operation. Need to investigate single case credit scenario with Red.
rm_issues.key_requirements: Serial weights must be preserved correctly during credit operations.
rm_issues.open_questions: How should single case credit be handled?

rm_issues.description: BOL Update – Add warehouse number, truck run, signature size
rm_issues.business_context: BOL needs additional fields for warehouse operations and must include orderlines with 0 qty picked.
rm_issues.technical_context: Report template modification required. Quote needed before development.
rm_issues.key_requirements: Add warehouse number, truck run line, increase signature size. Include 0 qty orderlines.

rm_issues.description: Order LPQ – load count off by 7
rm_issues.business_context: Load count discrepancy of 7 between pick count and load count.
rm_issues.technical_context: Count aggregation logic issue in LPQ calculation.
rm_issues.key_requirements: Pick count and load count must match exactly.

rm_issues.description: Request not to update InvStatCode – spec drafted
rm_issues.business_context: Farbest requests that InvStatCode not be automatically updated during certain operations.
rm_issues.technical_context: Spec drafted for conditional InvStatCode update behavior.
rm_issues.key_requirements: Conditionally skip InvStatCode updates based on configuration.
